# Job Preferences

> Test fixture for the e2e suite. Mirrors the shape `writePreferences` produces.

## Role
- Titles I'm targeting: Senior Product Designer, Staff Product Designer
- Track: IC
- Specialties: product-ux, design-systems

## Compensation
- Minimum base salary: $150,000
- Total comp target: $220,000
- Equity preferences: late-stage-private, public

## Location
- Preferred cities: San Francisco, CA; Remote
- Time zones: US Pacific
- Remote: yes, Hybrid: yes, Onsite: no
- Open to relocation: no
- US work authorization: yes
- Needs visa sponsorship: no

## Company
- Open stages: B-D, late-stage
- Size range: 100-2000
- Industries I want: ai-ml, dev-tools
- Industries to avoid: crypto
- Specific companies to exclude: (none)

## Work
- Design tools I use: Figma, Linear
- Tech stack to avoid: (none)
- Domains I'm excited about: AI products, Developer tools
- Problems I want to work on: I want to design tools that make people more capable.

## Culture & Schedule
- Hours / on-call expectations: standard hours, no on-call
- Travel tolerance: up to 2 trips per quarter
- Async vs synchronous teams: async-first preferred
- Anything else that matters: (none)

## Voice
- Never use em dashes in drafted prose
- Phrases to avoid: I'm passionate about, synergize
- Tone notes: direct, occasionally self-deprecating, never gushing
